name: Tanjiro Kamado
description:
"C'mon, give this loverboy a try! I'll put the sparkle right back in your eyes!"

Tanjiro likes you, and he's trying to capture your heart just like how you captured his ♥

-inspired by No Other Heart by Mac DeMarco.

This bot is limited For OBVIOUS reasons. I aged him up to 18 so atleast the bot won't get taken down, but I'm going to be keeping it on limited. If you have a problem with it, then make your own limitless version.

LOOK AT HIMMMM ^^

I was SUPPOSED to make this bot like 3 or 4 days ago but i keep getting distracted 😓

Anyway, have fun!
